languages.original_text: "The fate that befell Seberian was to be expected. The time of the great Rogue Trader has passed, and now the xenos' connivances only disrupt the ordinary course of events and time, and do not reshape it completely.

languages.text: "Участь, что постигла Себериана, закономерна. Время великого Вольного Торговца прошло, и проделки ксеносов лишь нарушают привычный ход событий и времени — не перекраивают его начисто".

"The fate that befell Seberian was to be expected. The time of the great Rogue Trader has passed, and now the xenos' connivances only disrupt the ordinary course of events and time, and do not reshape it completely.
languages.original_text: "Участь, что постигла Себериана, закономерна. Время великого Вольного Торговца прошло, и проделки ксеносов лишь нарушают привычный ход событий и времени — не перекраивают его начисто".

traits.locale_text: "The fate that befell Seberian was to be expected. The time of the great Rogue Trader has passed, and now the xenos' connivances only disrupt the ordinary course of events and time, and do not reshape it completely.

"The fate that befell Seberian was to be expected. The time of the great Rogue Trader has passed, and now the xenos' connivances only disrupt the ordinary course of events and time, and do not reshape it completely.

"The fate that befell Seberian was to be expected. The time of the great Rogue Trader has passed, and now the xenos' connivances only disrupt the ordinary course of events and time, and do not reshape it completely.

languages.text: 「シベリアんがこうなったのは当然のことだった。大規模な不正取引の時代は過ぎ去り、今では異星人の陰謀は通常の出来事や時間の流れを乱すだけで、完全に変えることはなくなった」
languages.original_text: "The fate that befell Seberian was to be expected. The time of the great Rogue Trader has passed, and now the xenos' connivances only disrupt the ordinary course of events and time, and do not reshape it completely.

traits.locale_text: シベリアがこうなったのは当然のことだった。大規模な不正取引の時代は過ぎ去り、今では異星人の陰謀は通常の出来事や時間の流れを乱すだけで、完全に変えることはなくなった。

languages.text: « Ce qui est arrivé à Seberian n'a rien d'étonnant. L'époque du grand libre-marchand est révolue, et maintenant, les machinations des xénos ne font que perturber le cours normal des événements et du temps, sans le changer totalement. »
languages.original_text: "The fate that befell Seberian was to be expected. The time of the great Rogue Trader has passed, and now the xenos' connivances only disrupt the ordinary course of events and time, and do not reshape it completely.

traits.locale_text: « Ce qui est arrivé à Seberian n'a rien d'étonnant. L'époque du grand libre-marchand est révolue, et maintenant, les machinations des xénos ne font que perturber le cours normal des événements et du temps, sans le changer totalement. »

languages.text: "Seberians Schicksal war zu erwarten gewesen. Die Zeit des mächtigen Freihändlers ist vorbei. Jetzt stören die Machenschaften der Xenos nur den normalen Lauf der Dinge und der Zeit, ohne sie vollständig zu verändern."
languages.original_text: "The fate that befell Seberian was to be expected. The time of the great Rogue Trader has passed, and now the xenos' connivances only disrupt the ordinary course of events and time, and do not reshape it completely.

traits.locale_text: "Seberians Schicksal war zu erwarten gewesen. Die Zeit des mächtigen Freihändlers ist vorbei. Jetzt stören die Machenschaften der Xenos nur den normalen Lauf der Dinge und der Zeit, ohne sie vollständig zu verändern."

languages.text: "Seberian'ın başına gelen kader, beklenen bir şeydi. Büyük Hür Tacir'in devri geçmişte kaldı. Artık zeno oyunları; olayların ve zamanın olağan akışını tamamen yeniden şekillendirmiyor, sadece bozuyor."
languages.original_text: "The fate that befell Seberian was to be expected. The time of the great Rogue Trader has passed, and now the xenos' connivances only disrupt the ordinary course of events and time, and do not reshape it completely.

traits.locale_text: "Seberian'ın başına gelen kader, beklenen bir şeydi. Büyük Hür Tacir'in devri geçmişte kaldı. Artık zeno oyunları; olayların ve zamanın olağan akışını tamamen yeniden şekillendirmiyor, sadece bozuyor."

languages.text: «El destino de Seberian era de esperar. Sus días como Comerciante Independiente habían terminado; ahora la complicidad de los xenos solo altera el devenir de los eventos, pero no lo determina por completo».
languages.original_text: "The fate that befell Seberian was to be expected. The time of the great Rogue Trader has passed, and now the xenos' connivances only disrupt the ordinary course of events and time, and do not reshape it completely.

traits.locale_text: «El destino de Seberian era de esperar. Sus días como Comerciante Independiente habían terminado; ahora la complicidad de los xenos solo altera el devenir de los eventos, pero no lo determina por completo».

languages.text: “塞贝里安的结局早已在意料之中。伟大的行商浪人时代已然终结，如今异形的阴谋只会扰乱原本的流程与岁月，难以再彻底改变其走向。”
languages.original_text: "The fate that befell Seberian was to be expected. The time of the great Rogue Trader has passed, and now the xenos' connivances only disrupt the ordinary course of events and time, and do not reshape it completely.
